'''Fassa''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] and niece to [[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Rugor Nass/Legends|Rugor Nass]].

==Biography==
[[File:Fassa.jpg|thumb|left|75px|Fassa during the time of the Galactic Civil War]]
Fassa served as a [[Major/Legends|major]] in the [[Gungan Grand Army/Legends|Gungan Grand Army]]. She was sent by [[Rep/Legends|Rep]] [[Teers/Legends|Teers]] to oversee the construction of an arena in [[Lake Umberbool]] to mark the [[Festival of Warriors]]. Fassa was caught in an accident that collapsed much of the structure, though she was saved by [[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]]. She pledged a [[Life debt/Legends|life debt]] to the hapless Binks as a way to repay his bravery, despite Jar Jar's insistence that he did not deserve the life debt. Fortunately for Binks, the life-debt was revoked by Boss Nass on a technicality.

Fassa later entered the [[Big Nasty Free-For-All]], and managed to beat Jar Jar, [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Roos Tarpals/Legends|Tarpals]] and even Nass himself to claim victory in the contest.

Following the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]], she was present in a laboratory bubble when an angered [[Bongo]] racer tried to kill two other racers. The trio took Nass' newly-renovated [[Heyblibber/Legends|heyblibber]] and managed to subdue him.

Years later, Fassa was still alive during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].
